meta.title: Contribute — NomeSito
meta.description: Find out how to contribute to the project: code, documentation, donations and community.

hero.title: Be part of the project
hero.subtitle: NomeSito is built by people, for people. Whether you write code, improve documentation or support the project financially, every contribution matters.

openSource.title: Fully open source
openSource.description: All code is public and freely accessible. You can inspect, modify and redistribute every part of the project.

community.title: An active community
community.description: Connect with developers, designers and enthusiasts who share your same vision.

impact.title: Real impact
impact.description: Your contribution improves a tool used by thousands of people every day.

ways.title: How you can contribute
ways.subtitle: Choose the way that suits you — you don't need to be a developer.

code.title: Write code
code.description: Open a pull request, fix a bug or propose a new feature on the GitHub repository.

docs.title: Improve documentation
docs.description: Fix errors, add examples or translate content to make it accessible to everyone.

donate.title: Support financially
donate.description: A donation, even a small one, helps cover project costs and keeps everything free.

community.title: Join the community
community.description: Answer questions, report issues, propose ideas and help those approaching the project for the first time.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: It only takes a few minutes to take the first step.
